ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective 1st June 2024
ham.body:
Hi Team,

We hope you are doing well. As part of our continuous efforts to improve work‑life balance, the HR department has updated the Company Leave Policy. Please review the new guidelines attached to this email and note the following key changes:

1. Annual Leave: 18 days from 1st June 2024, with a carry‑over limit of 5 days.
2. Sick Leave: Increased to 12 days per calendar year, subject to medical certificate.
3. Remote Work: Employees can now request up to 5 remote days per month.
4. Maternity/Paternity Leave: Enhanced benefits and extended eligibility.

The updated policy will take effect from 1st June 2024. If you have any questions, please reach out to HR at hr@company.com or call 012-345-6789.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
HR Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Zoom Meeting Invitation – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Team,

We have scheduled a critical Zoom meeting to discuss the upcoming project rollout. This meeting is mandatory for all project leads. Kripya join us at the following time:

Date: 12th October 2024
Time: 10:30 AM IST

To join the meeting, click the link below: <URL>

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: ABC123

If you are unable to attend, please notify the manager immediately. Failure to attend may affect your project status.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
Project Lead Team
